message:
bd-3oaig.5.10: add structured GenerationReport to parametric generator

The parametric flowchart generator now returns a GenerationReport alongside
the Mermaid source. This report captures generator parameters (nodes,
branching, density, label_len, seed) and resulting counts (actual_node_count,
actual_edge_count). Generator fields are included in JSONL telemetry output
and validated via the telemetry schema (nullable when not using generated sample).

Added 8 tests: deterministic generation, report correctness, different-seed
divergence, node-count scaling, JSONL field presence, and schema coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
